note: Static emptied-ledger floor for scripts/recheck_rekor_receipts.py. The published governance-receipts ledger is append-only, so the live re-check must never find fewer than this many *.dsse.json receipts. Fewer means the ledger branch was wiped or the fetch silently failed, and the monitor fails loudly instead of passing green with nothing to re-check. This file is the MANUAL minimum on main; it no longer needs hand-bumping for routine growth because dsse-receipts.yml now auto-records a DYNAMIC high-water mark (= total receipts) on the governance-receipts branch after each publish, and rekor-recheck.yml enforces the larger of the two. Bump this only upward; never lower it.
